title: Armor Plated Elytras
description: Fly without giving up protection! | Vanilla-Style Armor Plated Elytras (Iron, Diamond, Netherite) combine full flight with real armor, crafted by upgrading a standard elytra.
body:
# ⚔️ Armor Plated Elytras

> Three tiers of reinforced elytras that actually protect you while you fly.

The vanilla elytra is incredible for exploration — but the moment you land 
or take a hit mid-flight, you're completely exposed. Armor Plated Elytras 
fix that by combining the elytra's flight capability with real armor 
protection, crafted from materials you already know.

---

## ✨ Features

| Variant | Armor | Durability | Special |
|---|---|---|---|
| Iron Elytra | +2 | 500 | — |
| Diamond Elytra | +4 | 600 | — |
| Netherite Elytra | +6 | 800 | Fire Resistant |

---

## 🔨 Crafting Recipes

All three variants follow the same pattern — surround an Elytra 
with your material of choice in a crafting table.

X X X
X E X
X X X

- **Iron Elytra** — `X` = Iron Ingot
- **Diamond Elytra** — `X` = Diamond  
- **Netherite Elytra** — `X` = Netherite Scrap

---

## 🎨 Custom Textures

Each variant has unique hand drawn pixel art textures for both the 
inventory icon and the worn wings — so you always know exactly which 
tier you're wearing at a glance.

---

## ⚙️ Enchantments

All three variants support **Mending** and **Unbreaking** via anvil 
using enchanted books. They cannot be enchanted at the enchanting table.

---

## 🏷️ Rarity

All variants are **Epic** rarity — befitting gear that lets you soar 
through the sky in full armor.

---

## ⚠️ Requirements

- [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

---

## 🖥️ Server Compatible

Yes — all players must have the mod installed client side. The server 
must be running Fabric with Fabric API loaded.
